original_prompt:
I'll be in Paris on the 15th of November and I'm craving some Israeli cuisine. Can you give me the name of the restaurant with the best ratings?
Also, could you please add an event to my calendar for the 14th of November to remind me to book a table? The event title should be 'Dinner at {restaurant_name}', and the location set to the restaurant's address.
assessment_reasoning: The user's prompt is mostly clear: it specifies the city (Paris), cuisine (Israeli), the desired result (name of the best-rated restaurant), and the calendar event date (Nov 14) with required event title pattern and location set to the restaurant address. Missing or ambiguous details include: no explicit event start/end time or timezone (ground truth uses 18:00–20:00), no choice on which calendar/account to use or whether to confirm before creating the event, no tie-breaking rule if multiple restaurants share the top rating, and no explicit instruction about including the restaurant address or other details in the reply beyond the event location. These are relatively minor and the core task is well-specified, so I rate it as slightly ambiguous.

variations.L1: I'm going to Paris in mid-November and I want Israeli food. Find me the best Israeli restaurant there and set a reminder to book a table before I go.
variations.L2: I'll be in Paris on November 15 and I'm craving Israeli cuisine. Tell me which Israeli restaurant in Paris has the highest ratings. Also add a calendar reminder for the day before to book a table. Title the reminder 'Dinner at {restaurant_name}' and set the event location to the restaurant's address.
variations.L3: I'll be in Paris on 15 November and I'd like Israeli cuisine. Give me the name of the top-rated Israeli restaurant in Paris (by rating). Then add an event to my calendar on 14 November titled 'Dinner at {restaurant_name}' and set the event location to the restaurant's address. You can pick reasonable start/end times for the reminder.
variations.L4: I'll be in Paris on the 15th of November and I'm craving some Israeli cuisine. Can you give me the name of the restaurant with the best ratings? Also, could you please add an event to my calendar for the 14th of November to remind me to book a table? The event title should be 'Dinner at {restaurant_name}', and the location set to the restaurant's address.
variations.L5: I'm arriving in Paris on 2023-11-15. Please do the following precisely: (1) Find all restaurants in Paris (call/get data equivalent to get_all_restaurants_in_city('Paris')), determine which ones are Israeli (get_cuisine_type_for_restaurants), then identify the Israeli restaurant with the highest numeric rating (if there's a tie, choose the alphabetically first name). (2) Return that restaurant's name and full address in your reply. (3) Create a calendar event by calling create_calendar_event with these exact fields: title = 'Dinner at {restaurant_name}', start_time = '2023-11-14 18:00', end_time = '2023-11-14 20:00', description = 'Dinner at {restaurant_name} in Paris.', location = the restaurant's address. Perform the lookup steps in order: get_all_restaurants_in_city, get_cuisine_type_for_restaurants, get_rating_reviews_for_restaurants, get_restaurants_address, then create_calendar_event. Make sure the final message includes the chosen restaurant name.
